segments.text: There's also the dash attack. To handle that, you need a slight retreat—
segments.original_text: もあります ダッシュ攻撃でさばくためには薄い後ろに

segments.text: That backing-away action is necessary, though—
segments.original_text: 下がる引き行動が必要なんですけど

full_text: There's also the dash attack. To handle that, you need a slight retreat— That backing-away action is necessary, though—
